testcase.name: test_11_accept_receipt_with_incident
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:233: in test_11_accept_receipt_with_incident assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Failed to accept receipt: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to accept receipt: {"detail":"Insufficient stock for 'TEST_IncidentTicket_Product2' in source branch: have 0, need 15"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_12_list_incident_tickets

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 1 ticket after creation assert 0 >= 1

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:251: in test_12_list_incident_tickets assert data["total"] >= 1, "Expected at least 1 ticket after creation" E AssertionError: Expected at least 1 ticket after creation E assert 0 >= 1

testcase.name: test_15_get_incident_ticket_detail
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:289: in test_15_get_incident_ticket_detail assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get ticket detail: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get ticket detail: {"detail":"Ticket not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:325: in test_16_assign_ticket assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Failed to assign ticket: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to assign ticket: {"detail":"Ticket not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 404 assert 404 in [400, 200] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
